components.name: Prioritization & Decision Ranker
strengths: Group holdout by ward to reduce spatial leakage.
Uncertainty interval provided per score family.
known_risks: Trained on pilot-scale interventions and synthetic augmentation.
Ranking confidence is weaker for unseen project categories/agencies.
recommended_controls: Flag interventions with low rank margin for planner review.
Retrain quarterly after field execution outcomes are logged.

components.name: Civic Intelligence NLP
strengths: Per-language disparity checks included in training report.
known_risks: Bangla dialect and mixed-script colloquial reports can reduce confidence.
Extremely short reports may require human validation.
recommended_controls: Route low-confidence reports to enumerator validation queue.
Refresh language data with monthly citizen report samples.

components.name: Drainage Blockage Monitor
strengths: Threshold tuned for recall-weighted early warning.
known_risks: Severe unseen weather anomalies can shift score calibration.
Low-sensor wards rely more heavily on proxy features.
recommended_controls: Prioritize site inspection for high-risk segments with sparse sensors.
Recalibrate threshold during monsoon peak periods.

components.name: Flood Risk Regressor
strengths: Includes quantile uncertainty models for decision envelopes.
Bucket-level error diagnostics across low/medium/high risk zones.
known_risks: Relies on proxy elevation and congestion features, not full hydraulic simulation.
Rare extreme rainfall periods may require recalibration.
recommended_controls: Trigger manual review when uncertainty band width exceeds threshold.
Incorporate hydraulic simulation layers in future iterations.

components.name: Informal Area Segmentation
strengths: Segmentation quality validated with IoU and Dice.
Balanced precision/recall reporting for footprint extraction.
known_risks: Pilot model uses synthetic-style training patches for rapid prototyping.
Boundary precision may degrade on low-contrast or clouded imagery.
recommended_controls: Use field verification for uncertain boundary regions.
Expand training set with seasonally diverse imagery.

monitoring_playbook: Recompute trust report after each live data refresh batch.
Escalate components with status=needs_retraining to planner review.
Track calibration drift and group disparity every retraining cycle.
